narrative_beat: Close-up de mao apertando botao de inscricao estilizado em dourado, representacao abstrata sem logo YouTube

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a weathered right hand with visible knuckle wrinkles pressing down firmly on a large ornate golden button embedded in a dark mahogany surface, the button has a circular embossed sacred bell symbol, warm amber light erupting from around the button edges as it is depressed
subject.focal_point: the fingertip pressing the golden button with light erupting
subject.secondary: dark mahogany desk surface with aged patina around the button
props: ornate golden button with sacred bell embossing
amber light eruption from button edges

environment.time_of_day: dim, lit only by the button glow
environment.atmosphere: decisive action, the viewer is called to act now

composition.foreground: hand and golden button in vivid warm amber and gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white darkness beyond the desk edge

lighting.key_light: warm amber glow erupting from the button itself
lighting.fill_light: faint gold reflected off the pressing hand
lighting.rim_light: gold edge highlight on finger joints and button rim
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadows around the button crater

style.post_processing: halation around button glow, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, skin texture visible on hand, polished brass button surface

mood.emotion: direct call to action, subscribe now

symbolism.primary: pressing the button as covenant commitment
symbolism.secondary: golden light as reward for action

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text, logos, or brand marks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on fingertip and button

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
